title: Home Essentials Nail Files Buffers Emery Boards Beauty Tools Set Mani Pedi 18pc
description:
Professional manicures and pedicures, general nail care, maintenance, and touch-ups are simply not possible without the right tools. Whether you use this set of 18 nail files for natural nails or acrylic nails, they are an essential item to achieving smooth, polish-ready fingers and toes. By smoothing, buffing and cleaning up nails before applying nail polish, acrylic nails, gel nail polish or nail art, nail files help to ensure that your nail bed and nail edges are smooth, won’t snag or catch any material post-manicure or pedicure, and lastly, help your polish application to last as long as possible. This set of 18 assorted colorful nail files come in three different lengths: 5.25", 4.5" and 3.5" long

Home Essentials Nail Files Buffers Emery Boards Beauty Tools Set Mani Pedi 18pc

Professional manicures and pedicures, general nail care, maintenance, and touch-ups are simply not possible without the right tools. Whether you use this set of 18 nail files for natural nails or acrylic nails, they are an essential item to achieving smooth, polish-ready fingers and toes.

By smoothing, buffing and cleaning up nails before applying nail polish, acrylic nails, gel nail polish or nail art, nail files help to ensure that your nail bed and nail edges are smooth, won’t snag or catch any material post-manicure or pedicure, and lastly, help your polish application to last as long as possible. This set of 18 assorted colorful nail files come in three different lengths: 5.25", 4.5" and 3.5" long. Providing an excellent surface area for filling in a variety of convenient length options, these nail files or emery boards are easy and comfortable to handle and are of course, reusable!

Key Features

  • NAIL FILES FOR NATURAL NAILS: This economical set includes 18 assorted colorful nail files for shaping, buffing and smoothing; nail files are essential manicure and pedicure tools for nail prep that ensures nail polish, nail art, gel nail polish or acrylic nails or tips are applied to a smooth and snag free nail bed base for long lasting manicures and pedicures
  • EFFORTLESS HANDLING – The assorted set of yellow, blue and pink nail files for natural nails or acrylic nails measure 5.25, 4.5 and 3.5 inches long, providing excellent surface area for filing in a variety of convenient length options; the nail files are easy and comfortable to handle, even if you have long fingernails
  • LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE: Ideal to keep at home, in your bathroom vanity or for traveling, the nail files for natural nails or acrylic nails are lightweight and conveniently sized; they easily fit in your purse, handbag, work bag, backpack or luggage or in any makeup organizer or tray at a professional nail salon
  • EASY TO CLEAN – The set of 18 assorted nail files are easy to clean with soap and water; you’ll instantly remove dead skin cells and nail shavings quickly and effectively so they’re ready to go for your next nail polish, gel polish or nail art application manicure or pedicure
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Country of Origin: China; Sold as a set of 18 assorted nail files in pink, blue and yellow

Product Specifications

  • MPN: HE18NFSAS
  • UPC: 855569002404
  • Color: Pink
  • Size: Assorted

Aside from being an essential part of a manicure kit or pedicure set of tools, these nail files are lightweight and portable, ideal to keep at home, in your bathroom vanity, or for traveling. For natural nails or acrylic nails, the nail files are lightweight and conveniently sized; they easily fit in your purse, handbag, work bag, backpack, or luggage or in any makeup organizer or tray at a professional nail salon.

The nail files or nail buffers are also very easy to clean: simply rinse with soap and lukewarm or cold water and you’ll instantly remove dead skin cells and nail shavings quickly and effectively. Voila, they’re now ready to go for your next nail polish, gel polish, or nail art application manicure or pedicure.

So, whether you’re between professional salon appointments or are maintaining your own nails at home, beautifully styled, and durable nails will be much more achievable with a nail file and, you’ll be much happier with the long-lasting manicure and pedicure results!
